economic_notes: First Nation holds 14.28% equity in UCCMLP (building materials) and 16.66% in MMPLP (M'Nidoo M'Nising Power LP), both accounted for by modified equity method. COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with noted potential future financial impacts.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 (not 2024 as template default). Auditor's report dated April 15, 2021. Two government business partnerships (GBEs) accounted for by modified equity method: UCCMLP and MMPLP. Total government transfers calculated as Provincial ($706,342) + Federal ($2,771,300) = $3,477,642; OSR = $5,266,503 - $3,477,642 = $1,788,861. Federal funding includes ISC ($2,662,202), CMHC ($109,098). Employment and Economic Development expenses ($171,944) included in infrastructure line for mapping. Schedule of remuneration not included in the provided financial statement text. COVID-19 note included as subsequent event disclosure.
